ocr_text: 傳統的精進 The advancement of tradition 長兵類的戈、矛、戟仍是春秋戰國士兵的基本兵器組合，功能益發強大。 Polearms such as dagger-axes, spears, and halberds continued to be the basic gears for soldiers during the Spring and Autumn and Warring States periods, with their functionality becoming increasingly potent. 描繪於湖北擂鼓墩曾侯乙墓內棺上的多戈戟圖像
caption: 展區大段介紹牌「傳統的精進」，下附曾侯乙墓內棺多戈戟圖像

ocr_text: 草原騎兵的興起 The Rise of Steppe Horsemen 春秋戰國之際，中原地區諸國林立。與此同時，北方正逐步興起強大的游牧社會。南方中原諸國與北方機動性高群體之間的互動也促進青銅兵器的發展與變革。 During the Spring and Autumn and Warring States periods, numerous states emerged in the Central Plains. Concurrently, powerful nomadic societies were gradually rising in the north. The interaction between the sedentary Central Plains states in the south and the highly mobile groups in the north also spurred the development and transformation of bronze weapons.
caption: 展區介紹牌「草原騎兵的興起」

ocr_text: 農業人群對抗的武器 Weapons Used by Sedentary Populations 為因應北方草原機動性高的游牧人群，中原列國逐步改變戰爭型態，帶動步兵、騎兵的興起。春秋晚期晉國「毀車為行」和戰國時期趙國「胡服騎射」兩則著名歷史事件即反映此一趨勢。青銅劍和弩成為南方中原列國士兵的新興配備。 In response to the highly mobile nomadic groups from the steppe in the north, the Central Plains states gradually altered their warfare tactics, leading to the emergence of infantry and horsemen. Bronze swords and crossbows became the new equipment for soldiers in the Central Plains states in the south.
caption: 展區介紹牌「農業人群對抗的武器」，右側為持弓人物線描圖

gallery_guess: 青銅兵器（銘文／物勒工名）
ocr_text: 物勒工名： 武器製作的專業分工 Engraving the artisan's name: Specialization in Weapons Production 他是冶余，製做這件兵器。 兵器都會刻上生產資訊，以示負責。 就像現代的生產履歷。 He was Yeyu, the maker of this weapon. All weapons were marked with production information to indicate the artisans' accountability, similar to a modern-day production record. 釋文：元年安平相邦司徒田子，左庫鍛，工師趙晏，冶余執劑。
caption: 介紹牌「物勒工名：武器製作的專業分工」，右側為刻銘戈援特寫與釋文
notes: 右側直排釋文：元年安平相邦司徒田子，左庫鍛，工師趙晏，冶余執劑。對應IMG_4523安平相邦戈

caption: 雕雙獸與雲紋的春秋晚期玉鉞，置於陳列台上

ocr_text: 望山 Regulator(wang-shan) 發射前手拉望山可使牙上升，以上弦裝箭。到了漢代，望山上常有刻度，可確認發射角度，相當於現代瞄準具標尺的功能。 Before lunching, pulling the wang-shan can raise the nut(ya) to hook the bowstring. During the Han Dynasty, there were often scales on the Wang-shan, allowing confirmation of the releasing angle, similar to the function of modern aiming sights and scales.
caption: 弩機構件原理圖解螢幕，說明「望山」（regulator）的功能
notes: 互動平板螢幕畫面，弩機分解圖；英文lunching為原文拼字（應為launching）

ocr_text: 懸刀 Trigger(xuan-dao) 相當於現代手槍的板機，向後拉動懸刀，即可釋放弦，使箭發射。 The xuan-dao is equivalent to the modern firearm's trigger. Pulling the trigger backward can release the bowstring, allowing for the arrow to be launched.
caption: 弩機構件原理圖解螢幕，說明「懸刀」（trigger）的功能
notes: 互動平板螢幕畫面，弩機分解圖

ocr_text: 鈎心 Rocking lever(gou-xin) 連結牙與懸刀的零件。鈎心有上下兩齒，較短的上齒咬住牙，較長的下齒在懸刀上端的刻口。扣動懸刀，下齒因無刻口抵住會下沉，鈎心向下轉連動使牙下沉，弦即回彈，使箭發射出去。 The gou-xin is a component that connects the nut and the trigger. The gou-xin has upper and lower teeth, with the shorter upper tooth biting onto the nut, and the longer lower tooth engaging in a notch at the upper end of the trigger.
caption: 弩機構件原理圖解螢幕，說明「鈎心」（rocking lever）的功能
notes: 互動平板螢幕畫面，弩機分解圖
